title: Skincare Specialists
description: Provide skincare treatments to face and body to enhance an individual's appearance. Includes electrologists and laser hair removal specialists.

tasks.text: Sterilize equipment and clean work areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cleanse clients' skin with water, creams, or lotions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate how to clean and care for skin properly and recommend skin-care regimens.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine which products or colors will improve clients' skin quality and appearance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records of client needs and preferences and the services provided.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Treat the facial skin to maintain and improve its appearance, using specialized techniques and products, such as peels and masks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine clients' skin, using magnifying lamps or visors when necessary, to evaluate skin condition and appearance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Perform simple extractions to remove blackheads.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select and apply cosmetic products, such as creams, lotions, and tonics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stay abreast of latest industry trends, products, research, and treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply chemical peels to reduce fine lines and age spots.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Refer clients to medical personnel for treatment of serious skin problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove body and facial hair by applying wax.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with plastic surgeons and dermatologists to provide patients with preoperative and postoperative skin care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise clients about colors and types of makeup and instruct them in makeup application techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
